app.title: srvly
auth.signin.title: Sign in to srvly
auth.signin.desc: Connect your GitHub account to manage your servers.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
server.list.title: Servers
server.list.desc: Manage your servers connected to the platform
server.list.empty.title: No servers yet
server.list.empty.desc: Add your first VPS to start deploying apps.
server.add.title: New server
server.add.name: Server name
server.add.next: Next step: an SSH key will be generated. Run the command on your server to connect it.
server.added.title: Server added!
server.added.command: Command to run on your server
server.added.failed: Connection failed. Make sure the key was added to the server.
server.detail.actions.title: Configure automatically
server.detail.actions.subtitle: Security → Docker → Nginx → SSL in one command
server.detail.waiting.title: Server pending
server.detail.waiting.desc: Add the SSH public key to your server to enable actions.
server.detail.waiting.command: Command to run on your server
server.detail.apps.title: Installed apps
server.detail.apps.empty: No installations. Launch an app from the AI assistant.
server.detail.domains.title: Domains
server.detail.domains.desc: Add a custom domain pointing to an installed app (automatic Nginx reverse proxy).
server.detail.domains.hint: Configure your DNS (A record) to point to the server IP before SSL can be enabled.
catalog.title: Application Catalog
catalog.search: Search for an app (Nextcloud, Nginx, Vaultwarden...)
install.title: Installation parameters
install.domain.hint: Leave empty to use IP and port directly.
install.port.hint: Leave empty to use the default port.
install.prompt.title: Prompt to copy for your agent
install.empty: Select a server to generate the installation prompt.
settings.title: Settings
settings.token.desc: Use this token to connect your AI agent (Hermes, OpenCLAW...) to srvly.
settings.token.warning: Do not share this token. Regenerate it if you think it leaked.
settings.prompt.title: Prompt for your agent
